title: Azure Static Web Apps
summary: Azure Static Web Apps is a modern web app service that offers streamlined full-stack development from source code to global high availability.

sections.title: Azure Static Web Apps
sections.summary: Azure Static Web Apps is a modern web app service that offers streamlined full-stack development from source code to global high availability.

lessons.title: Publish an Angular, React, Svelte, or Vue JavaScript app with Azure Static Web Apps
lessons.content_md:
Publish an Angular, React, Svelte, or Vue JavaScript app with Azure Static Web Apps. Use Visual Studio Code to create and run the web app locally.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/publish-app-service-static-web-app-api/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Publish an Angular, React, Svelte, or Vue JavaScript app with Azure Static Web Apps

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Azure Static Web Apps
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Azure Static Web Apps**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
